interpretation: accepted is the contract status; produced is not passed or release-verified

requirements.qualification: The deterministic matched evaluation harness, baselines, ablations, trace shards, metrics, cluster confidence intervals, slices and failure analysis are implemented and fixture-tested. A deterministic nine-aim assessment now maps all 95 requirements and 21 controlling clauses to exact hashed evidence, negative findings, exceptions and next actions; it honestly reports eight partly fulfilled aims and one not yet testable aim while Gate 11 remains pending. The complete 28,800-question release run and participant results remain outstanding.

The semantic, publication, Explorer and read-only discovery foundations run against a representative fixture. A no-skip real-Chromium browser gate now covers accessibility-relevant behaviour, deep links, Pages fallback, gzip and budgets, but localhost/browser execution was refused in the current restricted run. Axe, expert, participant and full-corpus evidence remain pending.

The unsampled T0 union census is closed and integrity-checked: 848,977 candidate keys, 836,998 publication records, 137 opposing-pass Search partitions, 35 byte-stable sitemap shards, closed organisations/navigation, six redirects and zero unexplained omissions. A 75,000-page deterministic rendered-link detector preserves the shared request reserve. The resumable hydrator derives and enforces the launch-manifest 10 GiB retained-metadata ceiling, clears redundant completed inputs, reserves SQLite writes and verifies durable exports before transient cleanup. T0 hydration, T1 re-enumeration, closing delta and final zero-omission release reconciliation remain in progress.

The machine-applicable persona gate passes for 48 evidenced research hypotheses, 17 cross-cutting overlays, 11 required dimensions, all 83 pinned schema families, exhaustive 136-pair overlay scenarios, five high-risk t-way scenarios and two successive held-out no-new challenge passes. One genuine omission, privacy-sensitive context, was added as a contract-supported hypothesis. Human validation remains not authorised, evidence claim-support verification remains an F2 dependency, and the six release-v2 stories per persona must still be regenerated against the final snapshot; no UI preference claim is made.

The source preflight covers 32/32 official and 93/93 plan URLs while preserving superseded access failures. Independent ledgers verify 171/171 citation bindings and 40/40 joint claims with zero waivers or blockers. The evidence is currently bound to the fixture release identifier and must be regenerated with the final closing snapshot before publication.

Deterministic orchestration, bounded contracts, a hash-chained append-only activity contract, separate product/paid-API/source-request accounting, explicit access fallbacks, zero-paid-model policy, locked-dependency SBOM and isolated fixture reproduction exist. A completed repository-wide Codex Security campaign records 14 original findings, three residual low findings and their remediation at commit 27890dc; 32 focused post-fix tests pass. This is pre-release evidence only: T0 hydration, T1/closing, evaluation, final-snapshot security scanning, publication, independent adjudication and full-snapshot clean-room terminal evidence remain release work.
